segments.text: Okay, sir, you've applied for insurance, right? I'm calling for that. We'll do a telephonic medical verification. If you give wrong statements about your health or habits,
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: the calculations will change, and deductions will happen. So give correct answers. This call will also be recorded for company quality purposes and auditing purposes.
